hero.heading: Have an Idea Worth Building?
hero.subheading: Tell us what you're working on. If there's strong founder fit, market pull, and product potential, we'll help take it from concept to venture creation.
hero.footerNote: From Idea to Validation, all under one roof.

audiences.title: Built for Visionaries at Every Stage.
audiences.subtitle: Using AI to deliver faster.

target.title: Built for Ambitious Founders.
target.subtitle: Whether you have a bold idea or a product ready to scale, Crestcode meets you where you are.

cards.title: Idea-Stage Founders
cards.description: Turn raw potential into validated, investor-ready ventures with speed and precision.

cards.title: Growth-Stage Teams
cards.description: Scale your product with embedded senior engineering and product strategy.

founderQuote.text: We don't just ship features — we ask why. Every product decision is grounded in business strategy, user psychology, and long-term scalability.
founderQuote.author: Dharshini JCC

partnership.title: We don't just build. We partner.
